It's 50 grand And like legit just so you guys know that is what I'll spend on a test and we'll grab 20 or 30 gyms We'll spend you know two grand in a week or two In all those different markets that are representative To try and get a feel for which ads converted across the board in all of those markets, right? And so for us we're not even gonna put an ad into a portal that didn't convert it at least 80% of the markets Okay, so we have tons of ads that convert in half, but we're talking I need four out of five eighty plus percent to convert in all markets So and this is also why sometimes the ones that are out of the box that you guys have access to Don't work because like there is literally never an ad that will work in every single market Period which is why it's good to know this scrambler and know how to do it yourself. Hopefully that makes sense. All right, so that's the headline Copy short long free new reason why benefits so the two most powerful words in marketing are free and new Okay, and so having a new facility for example or a grand opening which is why that copy is in there works all the time Now those of you were like well, I've already been open for three years No one knows so you can have a grand opening or you can paint your wall and be like it's reopening Whatever you want and you might be like that's ridiculous. Say what you want. It works. Okay now This is like I said, this is how we this is what I give my team and so they look through this and they're like, okay We need a couple short versions couple long versions. We need to make sure that we say hey We're doing a free six week mom get you know get fit mom challenge We're new to the area The reason that we're doing this is because we're new to the area or because we're opening up the new program We've got tons of time slots and we want to fill it up, right? You like people like to know why? Okay, and so that's why you need to include that in the copy whenever you can Now the next thing is benefits like what's the benefits of signing up now? If you want to go benefits, that's like level one copywriting level two copywriting is tire benefits to status so instead of saying Gosh like Super tasty meals So that you like your food that is a benefit for sure. That's I mean that would convert but if you say like So that you can make food that's so good Everyone will be jealous of you or that you'll be the fittest mom in the neighborhood like I just said or so that all your friends will Wonder how are you eating such amazing food and still losing weight? Those are things that are beginning to be benefits that are also tied to status. Okay scarcity and urgency Sorry, this is translated by somebody or don't know if I work. Who's over you? Who doesn't speak English, but let's put it there Scarcity urgency just so you guys know scarcity is how many spots you have left urgency is a function of time Hurry, you know if this link still works then it means we might have a spot if the page loads We still have a spot if you're seeing this ad we might still have a spot That's all scarcity right urgency is what we put on the actual page Which says today is the last day to sign up and it has the date And then apply to Tharrie you want to be like hey We've already had 600 local residents who've gone through this program. It's unbelievable. Third thing page name and business name if you have multiple Facebook pages I would highly recommend that you run ads from each one of them and you can use like let's say you had a Bootcamp right you could have a page. That's your bootcamp name. That's one another one would be from your personal name Right like you notice that most of my ads come from Alex Hermosy a third one might be like best local bootcamp in and by best be like best midtown bootcamp or whatever your local areas name is right best Midtown fitness are like best midtown gyms Right or best midtown gym deals like those are all things that would be look different Why do you do that because it breaks it stops banner blindness? It stops people from seeing the same ad over and over again or seeing your ads over and over again and thinking Oh, this is the same thing and then they don't even engage with it So if you have multiple different business names even with the same ad or similar ads then they will be more likely to engage with it The fourth thing here And this is from an infographic book that I may or may not release who knows The fourth thing is image right and so this is image or video four and five should really go together But they are separate because you should be running image ads and you should also be running video ads. They both work Image ads are obviously faster and easier. So sometimes it's nice to just have images that convert But video in my experience if you have a really good video, it will outdo an image Images are easier in my mind to get base hits on but you'll get home runs from amazing videos So take that for what you will but with images the first thing we're gonna do no matter What the images is you want to increase the contrast? So if you go online canva can increase the contrast or saturation It just makes the image look different it pops more right another variation is to take that same image and make it black and white Why because on Facebook there are a lot of black and white images so people stop that's the point right? We're trying to break we're trying to grab attention Okay, having banners on an image that says free six week challenge or like a banner across it or like like lost two dress size actually probably can't say that but like You know can run around with my kids again without me paying like things like that like banners that are benefits They can't be tied specifically to weight loss or things that are going to be effective Diagonal manners tend to work better than any other kind just FYI Group pics like especially after people are working out and they're sweaty and they're together in their smiling tend to work the best You want to make sure that they are looking at the camera? Because especially if you've got somebody who's close up like this People's eyes can't help but see other people's eyes so it picks them out right and so you want to have that In as many pictures as you can and selfies kind of work really well like that too So it gives you like social proof because there's lots of people behind you But you have this person who's up front and again it feels familiar right and it also feels native to like Facebook and Instagram Now workout pics these are pics of people actually made workout That works great, especially if you have lots of people doing the same thing a lot of people doing planks a lot of people doing sit-ups I'll be doing bicycle, you know, whatever like all of those things if you can have people doing things together jumping jacks People like seeing people doing things in unison because then they feel like it is safe. I I really have yet to see this one not work It's just that most people don't do it because it takes effort But if you can coordinate everyone to do the same exercise at the same time in unison like doing push-ups in unison with somebody leading like one Two three one two three two right or burpees in unison or Gemini Jackson Unison or things that look very impressive in one frame where everyone's in unison in synchronized Those adds crush you throw a meme on there and like you are off the races So that is an example of the type of videos that will do the best And so the easiest way to do that is just at the end of class make that your finisher Until everyone they have to get coordinated or whatever And then use that as an ad so these are it this is a non exhaustive list of the things that you can do to create variations inside of your ads This should make a little bit of sense to you in terms of like why there should be lots of variation because if you want to have evergreen Advertising you do not need to change your offers. You do not need to change your page You need to change your creative and that is what this is That's what these people are seeing that's going to grab their attention enough to click while they're on the toilet And don't even care about anything enough to put their name and number in so that you can remind them and you can explain them And you can sell them and give them the garlic and the truth that they really need so I hope that makes sense I hope you found this valuable and I hope this gives you a lot of ideas of what you can do and last but not least There is no secret here The only thing that our team does that no one else does is when I say like we literally test 300 ads when I spend 50 grand We test 300 ads we actually make 300 ads. It's a lot of ads so If you want to start make 10 make 20 and start them at 10 bucks a day right and you can quickly turn off the ones that don't work and Keep the ones that are and I guarantee if you keep doing that and you do that on a weekly basis And you continue to make five new ads a week You will always always get fed and the other last thing is you have no alternative The alternative is to what not market course when I reach people you're trying to like change people's lives You should always be marketing right and so there is no alternative to like well What if the five ads that I run don't work make five more? There's no secret there's no secret juice like anyone who tries to sell you that is just selling a lie like no one knows You just test okay, so I hope this video is valuable for you Please execute and you will make more money All right
